title: Hair Gloss Treatments in Fresno – Shine & Revive Color
meta_title: Hair Gloss Treatments in Fresno – Shine & Revive Color
meta_description: Professional hair gloss treatments in Fresno to refresh color, boost shine, and restore vibrancy. Add-on or standalone services at Studio One Hair Design.
author: Studio One Hair Design
body_text:
Bring Back the Shine: Why Your Hair Feels Dull and Faded

You've invested in beautiful hair color—so why does it suddenly feel dull, brassy, or lifeless within weeks? Color fading results from sun exposure, hot tools, shampoo, and hard water. Blonde may turn yellow, brunettes lose richness, and reds flatten. "The shine and silky texture you left the salon with? Gone."

But professional hair gloss treatments offer a solution. These refreshments restore color vibrancy, boost shine, and revitalize hair without requiring full color appointments.

How Gloss Services Work at Studio One

Studio One simplifies color maintenance through gloss services added to color appointments with no additional time—or scheduled independently.

The studio uses high-performance gloss that enhances color while conditioning hair and sealing cuticles for maximum shine. Options suit highlights, all-over tone refreshes, or glossy glow pursuits.

Benefits of a Hair Gloss:

- Adds shine and luminosity to dull or dry hair
- Balances faded or brassy tones between full color sessions
- Helps hair feel healthier and more hydrated through conditioning formula
- Comes in tinted or clear options
- Can be done at every color appointment for ongoing maintenance
- Great for all hair types and textures

Hair Gloss for Gray Blending: A Gentle Intro to Color

Not ready for permanent color? "A hair gloss is the perfect way to camouflage gray hair without full commitment." The gloss gently stains gray strands, blending them with natural hair for soft, dimensional appearance.

While not permanent, it suits those noticing initial grays or curious about color possibilities. It provides low-pressure, high-reward introduction to professional color without long-term commitment.

Hair Gloss Pricing at Studio One

Studio One Hair Design offers straightforward pricing:

- Add-On Gloss with Any Color Service: $45
- Stand-Alone Gloss Treatment + Blowout: $90

Pricing includes professional blowout and styling.

Ready for Healthier, Shinier Hair?

If hair has lost sparkle or color feels off, a gloss may be the answer. It's quick, affordable, and delivers "fresh-from-the-salon finish without the full color process."

Book your hair gloss appointment: https://www.studioonefresno.com/booking

Let's bring your hair back to life, one gloss at a time.
